evidence_label: curative branch doctor-question refresh, not treatment advice
pubmed_query: (thalassemia[Title/Abstract]) AND (2026[dp]) AND (gene therapy OR exagamglogene OR exa-cel OR hematopoietic cell transplantation OR pyruvate kinase OR fetal hemoglobin OR BCL11A OR gamma-globin)

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_gene_manipulation
guideline_sources.role: separates gene addition and gene editing from allogeneic HCT

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_hct
guideline_sources.role: frames allogeneic HCT as a curative branch with donor, age, risk, and center constraints

regulatory_sources.label: FDA_CASGEVY
regulatory_sources.role: approved exagamglogene autotemcel benchmark for TDT age 12 years and older

regulatory_sources.label: FDA_ZYNTEGLO
regulatory_sources.role: approved betibeglogene autotemcel benchmark for beta-thalassemia requiring regular RBC transfusions

pubmed_records.title: Exa-cel in children with transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia or sickle cell disease.
Correction of ineffective erythropoiesis and normalization of iron homeostasis after exagamglogene autotemcel in TDT.
Best practices in gene therapy for sickle cell disease and transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia.
Second allogeneic hematopoietic cell transplantation after graft failure in children with hemoglobinopathies.
Clinical burden and healthcare resource utilization after allogeneic HCT for sickle cell disease or beta-thalassemia.
Pilot study of thalidomide in transfusion-dependent and non-transfusion-dependent thalassemia.

decision_use: Use the sources to ask a qualified clinician which branch is in scope after private packet review. Do not use them for patient-specific eligibility, trial screening, referral, travel, import, purchase, dosing, transfusion, chelation, or sample-routing decisions.
